@startuml
actor Client
participant APIGateway
participant RateLimiter
participant BackendService

Client -> APIGateway : Request data
APIGateway -> RateLimiter : Check quota
RateLimiter --> APIGateway : Quota status

alt Quota available
    APIGateway -> BackendService : Forward request
    BackendService --> APIGateway : Data
    APIGateway --> Client : Data
else Quota exhausted
    APIGateway --> Client : Reject (Too many requests)
    Client -> Client : Waits backoff period
    loop 3 retries
        Client -> APIGateway : Retry request
        APIGateway -> RateLimiter : Check quota
        RateLimiter --> APIGateway : Quota status
        alt Quota available
            APIGateway -> BackendService : Forward request
            BackendService --> APIGateway : Data
            APIGateway --> Client : Data
            break
        else Quota exhausted
            APIGateway --> Client : Reject (Too many requests)
            Client -> Client : Waits backoff period
        end
    end
end
@enduml

    APIGateway-->>Client: Data
  else Quota exhausted
    RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: Quota exhausted

    loop Client retries (up to 3 times with backoff)

        alt Quota available on retry
            RateLimiter-->>APIGateway: Quota available
            APIGateway->>BackendService: Forward request
            BackendService-->>APIGateway: Data
            APIGateway-->>Client: Data
        else Quota exhausted on retry

@startuml
actor User
participant "Web Portal" as WebPortal
participant "Authentication Service" as AuthService
participant "User Database" as UserDB
participant "Email Service" as EmailService

User -> WebPortal : Request password reset (email)
WebPortal -> AuthService : Reset password (email)
AuthService -> UserDB : Lookup user by email

alt User exists
    UserDB --> AuthService : User found
    AuthService -> AuthService : Generate reset token
    AuthService -> UserDB : Store reset token
    UserDB --> AuthService : Token stored
    AuthService ->> EmailService : Trigger send reset email (async)
else User not found
    UserDB --> AuthService : User not found
    ' AuthService prepares a neutral message without further action
end

AuthService --> WebPortal : Neutral notification
WebPortal --> User : "Password reset link sent (if exists)"
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant Web Portal
  participant Authentication Service
  participant User Database
  participant Email Service

  User->>Web Portal: request password reset (email)
  Web Portal->>Authentication Service: reset password (email)
  Authentication Service->>User Database: lookup user by email

  alt User exists
    User Database-->>Authentication Service: user found
    Authentication Service->>Authentication Service: generate reset token
    Authentication Service->>User Database: store reset token
    User Database-->>Authentication Service: token stored confirmation
    Authentication Service->>Email Service: trigger send reset email
  else User unknown
    User Database-->>Authentication Service: user not found
  end

  Authentication Service-->>Web Portal: neutral success notification
  Web Portal-->>User: neutral success notification

edges: Gateway -> Cache : store result (JWT, verification result) (message)
finalCode:
@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as Gateway
participant "Token Cache" as Cache
participant "Authentication Service" as Auth
participant "Order Service" as Order

Client -> Gateway : call order endpoint (JWT)
Gateway -> Cache : check token (JWT)

alt cache hit (token valid)
    Cache --> Gateway : token valid
    Gateway -> Order : get order list
    Order --> Gateway : order list
    Gateway --> Client : order list
else cache hit (token invalid)
    Cache --> Gateway : token invalid
    Gateway --> Client : access denied
else cache miss
    Cache --> Gateway : token not found
    Gateway -> Auth : verify token (JWT)
    Auth --> Gateway : verification result

    Gateway -> Cache : store result (JWT, verification result)
    Cache --> Gateway : stored

    alt verification result is valid
        Gateway -> Order : get order list
        Order --> Gateway : order list
        Gateway --> Client : order list
    else verification result is invalid
        Gateway --> Client : access denied
    end
end
@enduml

edges: APIGateway -> TokenCache : check token for validation (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram
  actor Client
  participant APIGateway
  participant TokenCache
  participant AuthService
  participant OrderService

  Client->>APIGateway: call order endpoint (JWT)
  APIGateway->>TokenCache: check token for validation
  alt no cache entry
    TokenCache-->>APIGateway: token not validated
    APIGateway->>AuthService: verify token (JWT)
    AuthService-->>APIGateway: token valid/invalid
    APIGateway->>TokenCache: store validation result
  else cache entry found
    TokenCache-->>APIGateway: token valid/invalid
  end

  alt token is valid
    APIGateway->>OrderService: forward request
    OrderService-->>APIGateway: order list
    APIGateway-->>Client: order list
  else token is invalid
    APIGateway-->>Client: access denied
  end

SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logEvent("Reservation cancelled due to failed payment") (message)
OrderService -> Customer : informOrderStatus("Payment failed, order cancelled") (message)

sequenceDiagram
  actor Customer
  participant OrderService
  participant SagaOrchestrator
  participant EventLog
  participant WarehouseService
  participant PaymentService
  participant ShipmentService

  Customer->>OrderService: placeOrder()
  OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: instantiateSaga()

  par reserveItemsAndLog
    SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: reserveItems()
  and
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Saga started: Reserving items")
  end
  WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: reservationResult
  SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Warehouse reservation result received")

  alt Items Available
    par processPaymentAndLog
      SagaOrchestrator->>PaymentService: processPayment()
    and
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Items reserved: Processing payment")
    end
    PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: paymentResult
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Payment result received")

    alt Payment Succeeded
      par commissionShipmentAndLog
        SagaOrchestrator->>ShipmentService: commissionShipment()
      and
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Payment successful: Commissioning shipment")
      end
      ShipmentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: shipmentResult
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Shipment result received")
      SagaOrchestrator->>OrderService: orderCompleted("Success")
      OrderService->>Customer: informOrderStatus("Order placed")
    else Payment Failed
      par cancelReservationAndLog
        SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: cancelReservation()
      and
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Payment failed: Cancelling reservation")
      end
      WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: cancellationResult
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Reservation cancelled due to failed payment")
      SagaOrchestrator->>OrderService: orderCompleted("Payment failed")
      OrderService->>Customer: informOrderStatus("Payment failed, order cancelled")
    end

  else Items Not Available
    par abortTransactionAndLog
      SagaOrchestrator->>OrderService: orderAborted("Items unavailable")
    and
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("Items not available: Transaction aborted")
    end
    OrderService->>Customer: informOrderStatus("Items unavailable, order aborted")
  end

  OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: tearDownSaga()

finalCode:
@startuml
actor Customer
participant OrderService
participant SagaOrchestrator
participant EventLog
participant WarehouseService
participant PaymentService
participant ShipmentService

Customer -> OrderService : placeOrder()
activate OrderService

OrderService -> SagaOrchestrator : newOrderSaga(orderId, items, amount, address)
activate SagaOrchestrator

SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Saga_Started)
activate EventLog
EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
deactivate EventLog

SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : reserveItems(orderId, items)
activate WarehouseService

alt Items Available
    WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsReserved(reservationId)
    deactivate WarehouseService
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Items_Reserved)
    activate EventLog
    EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
    deactivate EventLog

    SagaOrchestrator -> PaymentService : processPayment(orderId, amount)
    activate PaymentService

    alt Payment Succeeded
        PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentProcessed(transactionId)
        deactivate PaymentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Payment_Processed)
        activate EventLog
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
        deactivate EventLog

        SagaOrchestrator -> ShipmentService : commissionShipment(orderId, address)
        activate ShipmentService
        ShipmentService --> SagaOrchestrator : shipmentCommissioned(trackingId)
        deactivate ShipmentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Shipment_Commissioned)
        activate EventLog
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
        deactivate EventLog

        SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : orderCompleted(orderId, trackingId)
        deactivate SagaOrchestrator
        destroy SagaOrchestrator
        OrderService --> Customer : orderStatus(completed, trackingId)
        deactivate OrderService

    else Payment Failed
        PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentFailed()
        deactivate PaymentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Payment_Failed)
        activate EventLog
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
        deactivate EventLog

        SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : cancelReservation(reservationId)
        activate WarehouseService
        WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : reservationCancelled()
        deactivate WarehouseService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Reservation_Cancelled_Compensating)
        activate EventLog
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
        deactivate EventLog

        SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : orderFailed(orderId, reason: payment_failed)
        deactivate SagaOrchestrator
        destroy SagaOrchestrator
        OrderService --> Customer : orderStatus(failed, reason: payment_failed)
        deactivate OrderService
    end

else Items Unavailable
    WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsUnavailable()
    deactivate WarehouseService
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(Items_Unavailable_Aborted)
    activate EventLog
    EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
    deactivate EventLog

    SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : orderFailed(orderId, reason: out_of_stock)
    deactivate SagaOrchestrator
    destroy SagaOrchestrator
    OrderService --> Customer : orderStatus(failed, reason: out_of_stock)
    deactivate OrderService
end
@enduml

@startuml
actor User
participant ClientApp
participant Browser
participant AuthServer
participant SessionStore
participant AuditLog
participant ResourceServer

User -> ClientApp : initiates login
ClientApp -> Browser : redirect to AuthServer
Browser -> AuthServer : request login form
AuthServer -> SessionStore : create new session
SessionStore --> AuthServer : session ID
AuthServer --> Browser : login form
Browser --> User : displays login form

User -> Browser : enters credentials
Browser -> AuthServer : submits credentials

alt Successful verification
    AuthServer -> AuthServer : verify credentials (success)
    AuthServer -> Browser : issues authorization code (redirect)
    Browser -> ClientApp : callback with authorization code

    ClientApp -> AuthServer : exchange code for token
    AuthServer -> AuditLog : note token issuance
    AuthServer --> ClientApp : access token

    opt If profile scope requested
        ClientApp -> ResourceServer : retrieve user profile (access token)
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : verify access token
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : token valid
        ResourceServer --> ClientApp : user profile data
    end
else Wrong credentials
    AuthServer -> AuthServer : verify credentials (fail)
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discard session
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : session discarded
    AuthServer --> Browser : error message
    Browser --> User : displays error message
end
@enduml

    EBA -> Driver : acoustic warning

    EBA -> Log : record braking event

    EBA -> Driver : distance warning

    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>Driver: warn acoustically
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant->>ControlUnit: initiate autonomous braking maneuver
    loop Adjust brake pressure until vehicle is stationary

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "SatelliteSystem") {
    // 1. Abstract blocks (isAbstract is an attribute of partDef, specializing link is not supported)
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument", isAbstract = true)

    // 2. Leaf components
    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera")
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar")
    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")
    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val powerDistributionUnit = partDef(name = "Power Distribution Unit")
    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")
    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    // 3. Subsystems (composing leaf components)
    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "opticalCamera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "sarRadar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }
    val structureThermalControlSubsystem = partDef(name = "Structure and Thermal Control Subsystem") {
        part(name = "primaryStructure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "solarPanels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "heatShield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }
    val electricalPowerSupplySubsystem = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply Subsystem") {
        part(name = "batteryArray", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "solarPowerRegulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "powerDistributionUnit", typeId = powerDistributionUnit.id)
    }
    val aocsSubsystem = partDef(name = "Attitude and Orbit Control System (AOCS)") {
        part(name = "starSensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "reactionWheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }
    val ttncSubsystem = partDef(name = "Telemetry, Tracking & Command (TT&C) Subsystem") {
        part(name = "onBoardComputer", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "rfTransmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rfReceiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    // 4. Earth Observation Satellite (composing subsystems)
    val earthObservationSatellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payload", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structureThermalControl", typeId = structureThermalControlSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "electricalPowerSupply", typeId = electricalPowerSupplySubsystem.id)
        part(name = "aocs", typeId = aocsSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "ttnc", typeId = ttncSubsystem.id)
    }

    // BDD Block: Include all partDefs to render.
    bdd(name = "SatelliteSystem BDD") {
        include(earthObservationSatellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(structureThermalControlSubsystem)
        include(electricalPowerSupplySubsystem)
        include(aocsSubsystem)
        include(ttncSubsystem)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(powerDistributionUnit)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}
